payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Partial/edge-cropped view of a dark upholstered chair back with vertical beige/cream stripes and a rounded top edge; padded, ribbed fabric texture visible and appears slightly worn — likely photographed close to the camera (≈0.6 m).
